items.title: A Global Market Based on Gold Bars Shudders on Tariff Threat
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- The global gold market relies on a network of banks, refineries and couriers that can fly bullion between key trading hubs at a moment’s notice in pursuit of the highest prices. items.title: President Trump Just Gave Stock Investors 2 Reasons to Worry About Another Market Crash
items.author: Trevor Jennewine
items.description: President Trump reinstated severe tariffs and fired the Bureau of Labor Statistics commissioner, creating economic uncertainty that could potentially trigger a stock market decline. The actions have raised concerns about import taxes, economic data integrity, and potential market volatility.
